    <item>
        <guid>nba530628</guid>
        <title>Duncan Robinson: Game-time call for Game 6</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/duncan-robinson-4470</link>
        <description>Robinson (back) is questionable for Game 6 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals against Cleveland on Friday, Danny Cunningham of Sports Radio 92.3 The Fan Cleveland reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 14 May 2026 2:20:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530619</guid>
        <title>Cade Cunningham: Scores 39 points with nine dimes</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cade-cunningham-5336</link>
        <description>Cunningham contributed 39 points (13-27 FG, 6-10 3Pt, 7-8 FT), seven rebounds, nine assists and two steals over 48 minutes during Wednesday's Game 5 overtime loss to Cleveland in the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 13 May 2026 8:18:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530620</guid>
        <title>James Harden: Leads Cavs to overtime win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/james-harden-3018</link>
        <description>Harden finished with 30 points (8-21 FG, 3-10 3Pt, 11-14 FT), eight rebounds, six assists, one steal and three blocks across 43 minutes in Wednesday's 117-113 win over Detroit in Game 5 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 13 May 2026 8:18:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530616</guid>
        <title>Kevin Huerter: Available to play</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/kevin-huerter-4449</link>
        <description>Huerter (thigh) is available for Wednesday's Game 5 matchup of the Eastern Conference Semifinals with Cleveland.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 13 May 2026 4:38:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530614</guid>
        <title>Keegan Murray: Undergoes ankle surgery</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/keegan-murray-5699</link>
        <description>Murray underwent an arthroscopic procedure to remove loose bodies in his left ankle Tuesday, per James Ham of ESPN 1320 Sacramento.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 13 May 2026 11:32:00 AM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
